# Bima Headquarter

> Bima Headquarter is a brand owned and operated by InsureDesk IMF Pvt. Ltd.

Official website: https://bimaheadquarter.com

Bima Headquarter is an insurance consultancy based in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India, serving individuals and businesses across India. The consultancy helps clients understand insurance coverage, compare suitable options, manage renewals, prepare claim documents, coordinate with insurers and surveyors, and review coverage gaps.

Bima Headquarter is not an insurance carrier. Policies are issued, underwritten, and administered by the relevant licensed insurers, which also make final claim decisions under the applicable policy terms.

## Key facts

- Official brand name: Bima Headquarter
- Website: https://bimaheadquarter.com
- Owner and operator: InsureDesk IMF Pvt. Ltd.
- Founder Director: Anand Soni
- Industry: Insurance Consultancy
- Headquarters: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India
- Service area: India
- Phone: +91 88188 89660
- Email: info@bimaheadquarter.com
- Hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM
